🏥 CMS Patient Access API Demo

Interactive SMART on FHIR Implementation

📋 About This Demo

This application demonstrates compliance with the CMS Interoperability and Patient Access final rule. It showcases how patients can securely access their health data through standardized FHIR APIs using SMART on FHIR authorization.

🔐

Secure OAuth 2.0

Patient-authorized access using industry standards

📊

FHIR R4 API

HL7 FHIR standard for interoperability

🏛️

CMS Compliant

Meets regulatory requirements

Select FHIR Server:

⚠️ Demo Environment

This is a demonstration using test data. No real Protected Health Information (PHI) is accessed or stored. For production use, ensure proper security controls and compliance measures are in place.

Built with SMART on FHIR | Powered by fhir-client.js
